title: gonystylus miquelianus
intro: Gonystylus miquelianus, also known as Miquel's Gonystylus or Ramin, is a species of tree in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the regions of Malaysia, Indonesia, and the Philippines. The Gonystylus miquelianus plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
